SignIn.title: Manage your projects
SignIn.subtitle: Drag & drop tasks, track priorities, and collaborate — all in one board.

LandingPage.hero_subtitle: A high-performance Kanban workspace built to bridge the gap between task management and interactive analytics. Track metrics, organize priorities, and deploy ideas faster.
LandingPage.features_title: Everything you need to stay on track
LandingPage.features_subtitle: Built with modern technologies to deliver a robust, snappy experience.

features.kanban_desc: Organize your tasks visually. Drag, drop, and structure your pipeline effortlessly across multiple customized columns.
features.metrics_desc: Get an instant overview of your productivity. Track total boards, active tasks, and weekly activity from your dashboard.
features.filtering_desc: Find what matters instantly. Search by title, filter by date range or task count across all your boards.
features.mobile_desc: Drag and drop works seamlessly on touch devices. Manage your tasks on the go without losing any functionality.
features.priority_desc: Mark tasks as low, medium, or high priority. Visual indicators keep your team focused on what matters most.
features.assignment_desc: Assign tasks to team members and set due dates. Keep everyone accountable with clear ownership and deadlines.

Dashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your boards and tasks for today.
Dashboard.no_boards_desc: Create your first board to start organizing your projects and tasks.
Dashboard.error_desc: There was a problem connecting to Supabase. This can happen if the database is waking up or if your local session has expired.
